name: Split on Empty String
description: String.split() called on a parameter that could be empty. ''.split(x) returns [''] (array with one empty string), not [] (empty array).
smt2Template:
(declare-const input_length Int)
(declare-const result_length Int)
(assert (= input_length 0))
(assert (= result_length 1))
(assert (> result_length 0))
(check-sat)

teachingExample.explanation: splitting empty CSV line returns [''] not [] — loop processes phantom empty field
teachingExample.smt2:
(declare-const line_length Int)
(declare-const fields Int)
(assert (= line_length 0))
(assert (= fields 1))
(check-sat)
